description.ko: 빛이 영원한 우주의 심연 속으로 사라지고, 신비로운 중력핵 주위에서 물리 법칙이 뒤틀리는 우주의 고요한 심장부로의 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the silent heart of the universe, where light fades into the eternal cosmic deep and the laws of physics bend around a mysterious gravitational core.

prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic visualization of the VOID-3 cosmic deep, featuring swirling dark matter, luminescent nebulae in deep shades of violet and midnight blue, a gravitational singularity distorting the fabric of space-time, distant glowing star clusters, ethereal atmospheric lighting, 8k resolution, cosmic horror aesthetic, photorealistic textures.
